---
title: "headvel_prior_to_category_glmm"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)   # dplyr, ggplot2, etc.
library(glmmTMB)
library(gghalves)
library(car)
library(DHARMa)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Load data
# ---------------------------------------------------------
ctx_fixations <- read.csv("C:/Users/Marcel/Desktop/Study Project/VR Data/ctx_fixations.csv")

# Convert seconds → milliseconds
ctx_fixations$length_ms <- ctx_fixations$length * 1000

cat_col  <- "ObjectCategoryMerged"
subj_col <- "SubjectID"

# Desired category order and colors (shared)
desired_order <- c("Background", "Building", "Landmark", "Body", "Face")

palette_vals <- c(
  Background = "#1f77b4",
  Building   = "#ff7f0e",
  Landmark   = "#2ca02c",
  Body       = "#d62728",
  Face       = "#9467bd"
)
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# RESIDUAL DIAGNOSTICS HELPERS
# =========================================================

run_dharma_checks <- function(model, model_name) {
  cat("\n==================================================\n")
  cat("DHARMa residual diagnostics:", model_name, "\n")
  cat("==================================================\n")

  sim_res <- simulateResiduals(
    fittedModel = model,
    n = 1000,
    plot = FALSE
  )

  cat("\n----- Uniformity test -----\n")
  print(testUniformity(sim_res))

  cat("\n----- Dispersion test -----\n")
  print(testDispersion(sim_res))

  cat("\n----- Outlier test -----\n")
  print(testOutliers(sim_res))

  cat("\n----- Quantile test -----\n")
  print(testQuantiles(sim_res))

  plot(sim_res)

  fitted_vals <- predict(model, type = "response")
  plotResiduals(sim_res, form = fitted_vals)

  invisible(sim_res)
}

run_gaussian_residual_checks <- function(model, model_name) {
  cat("\n==================================================\n")
  cat("Gaussian raw residual diagnostics:", model_name, "\n")
  cat("==================================================\n")

  pearson_res <- residuals(model, type = "pearson")
  fitted_vals  <- predict(model, type = "response")

  cat("\n----- Pearson residual summary -----\n")
  print(summary(pearson_res))

  op <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
  par(mfrow = c(2, 2))

  hist(
    pearson_res,
    breaks = 40,
    main = paste("Histogram of Pearson residuals\n", model_name),
    xlab = "Pearson residuals"
  )

  qqnorm(
    pearson_res,
    main = paste("QQ plot of Pearson residuals\n", model_name)
  )
  qqline(pearson_res)

  plot(
    fitted_vals,
    pearson_res,
    xlab = "Fitted values",
    ylab = "Pearson residuals",
    main = paste("Residuals vs fitted\n", model_name)
  )
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

  boxplot(
    pearson_res,
    horizontal = TRUE,
    main = paste("Boxplot of Pearson residuals\n", model_name),
    xlab = "Pearson residuals"
  )

  par(op)

  invisible(pearson_res)
}
```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# HEAD VELOCITY: 100 ms prior to fixation
# log-Gaussian model
# =========================================================

head_dat <- ctx_fixations[, c(subj_col, cat_col, "head_vel_100ms_prior")]

head_dat <- head_dat[
  !is.na(head_dat[["head_vel_100ms_prior"]]) &
    !is.na(head_dat[[cat_col]]) &
    head_dat[["head_vel_100ms_prior"]] > 0,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

head_dat[[cat_col]]  <- factor(head_dat[[cat_col]])
head_dat[[subj_col]] <- factor(head_dat[[subj_col]])

present_order_head <- desired_order[desired_order %in% levels(head_dat[[cat_col]])]
head_dat[[cat_col]] <- factor(head_dat[[cat_col]], levels = present_order_head)

head_dat <- as_tibble(head_dat) %>%
  mutate(log_head_vel_100ms_prior = log(head_vel_100ms_prior))

# -----------------------------
# Subject-level descriptives
# -----------------------------
head_subj_means <- head_dat %>%
  group_by(.data[[subj_col]], .data[[cat_col]]) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_deg_s = mean(.data[["head_vel_100ms_prior"]]),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

head_group_summary <- head_subj_means %>%
  group_by(.data[[cat_col]]) %>%
  summarise(
    subjects          = n(),
    mean_of_subj_means = mean(mean_deg_s),
    sd_of_subj_means   = sd(mean_deg_s),
    .groups            = "drop"
  )

cat("\n===== Subject-level group summary: head velocity 100 ms prior (deg/s) =====\n")
print(head_group_summary)

# -----------------------------
# Mixed model
# -----------------------------
cat("\nFitting glmmTMB: log(head_vel_100ms_prior) ~", cat_col, "+ (1|", subj_col, ")\n")

head_model <- glmmTMB(
  formula = log_head_vel_100ms_prior ~ ObjectCategoryMerged + (1 | SubjectID),
  family  = gaussian(link = "identity"),
  data    = head_dat
)

cat("\n===== Mixed model summary: log head velocity 100 ms prior =====\n")
print(summary(head_model))

cat("\n===== Type II Wald chi-square test: log head velocity 100 ms prior =====\n")
print(Anova(head_model, type = "II"))

# -----------------------------
# Residual diagnostics
# -----------------------------
head_dharma_res <- run_dharma_checks(
  model = head_model,
  model_name = "log head velocity 100 ms prior"
)

head_gaussian_res <- run_gaussian_residual_checks(
  model = head_model,
  model_name = "log head velocity 100 ms prior"
)

palette_used_head <- palette_vals[present_order_head]

# -----------------------------
# Plot
# -----------------------------
p_head_subj <- ggplot(
  head_subj_means,
  aes(x = .data[[cat_col]], y = mean_deg_s, fill = .data[[cat_col]])
) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.5, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_used_head) +
  labs(
    x     = "",
    y     = "Head angular velocity 100 ms prior (deg/s)",
    title = "Subject-level head angular velocity 100 ms before fixation onset\nby object category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_head_subj)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# PREVIOUS SACCADE PEAK VELOCITY
# log-Gaussian model
# =========================================================

peak_dat <- ctx_fixations[, c(subj_col, cat_col, "prev_saccade_peak_velocity_deg_per_s")]

peak_dat <- peak_dat[
  !is.na(peak_dat[["prev_saccade_peak_velocity_deg_per_s"]]) &
    !is.na(peak_dat[[cat_col]]) &
    peak_dat[["prev_saccade_peak_velocity_deg_per_s"]] > 0,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

peak_dat[[cat_col]]  <- factor(peak_dat[[cat_col]])
peak_dat[[subj_col]] <- factor(peak_dat[[subj_col]])

present_order_peak <- desired_order[desired_order %in% levels(peak_dat[[cat_col]])]
peak_dat[[cat_col]] <- factor(peak_dat[[cat_col]], levels = present_order_peak)

peak_dat <- as_tibble(peak_dat) %>%
  mutate(log_prev_saccade_peak_velocity_deg_per_s = log(prev_saccade_peak_velocity_deg_per_s))

# -----------------------------
# Subject-level descriptives
# -----------------------------
peak_subj_means <- peak_dat %>%
  group_by(.data[[subj_col]], .data[[cat_col]]) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_deg_s = mean(.data[["prev_saccade_peak_velocity_deg_per_s"]]),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

peak_group_summary <- peak_subj_means %>%
  group_by(.data[[cat_col]]) %>%
  summarise(
    subjects          = n(),
    mean_of_subj_means = mean(mean_deg_s),
    sd_of_subj_means   = sd(mean_deg_s),
    .groups            = "drop"
  )

cat("\n===== Subject-level group summary: previous saccade peak velocity (deg/s) =====\n")
print(peak_group_summary)

# -----------------------------
# Mixed model
# -----------------------------
cat("\nFitting glmmTMB: log(prev_saccade_peak_velocity_deg_per_s) ~", cat_col, "+ (1|", subj_col, ")\n")

peak_model <- glmmTMB(
  formula = log_prev_saccade_peak_velocity_deg_per_s ~ ObjectCategoryMerged + (1 | SubjectID),
  family  = gaussian(link = "identity"),
  data    = peak_dat
)

cat("\n===== Mixed model summary: log previous saccade peak velocity =====\n")
print(summary(peak_model))

cat("\n===== Type II Wald chi-square test: log previous saccade peak velocity =====\n")
print(Anova(peak_model, type = "II"))

# -----------------------------
# Residual diagnostics
# -----------------------------
peak_dharma_res <- run_dharma_checks(
  model = peak_model,
  model_name = "log previous saccade peak velocity"
)

peak_gaussian_res <- run_gaussian_residual_checks(
  model = peak_model,
  model_name = "log previous saccade peak velocity"
)

palette_used_peak <- palette_vals[present_order_peak]

# -----------------------------
# Plot
# -----------------------------
p_peak_subj <- ggplot(
  peak_subj_means,
  aes(x = .data[[cat_col]], y = mean_deg_s, fill = .data[[cat_col]])
) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.5, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_used_peak) +
  labs(
    x     = "",
    y     = "Previous saccade peak velocity (deg/s)",
    title = "Subject-level previous saccade peak velocity\nby object category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_peak_subj)
```

```{r}
# =========================================================
# FIXATION DURATION
# Gamma(log) model
# =========================================================

len_dat <- ctx_fixations[, c(subj_col, cat_col, "length_ms")]

len_dat <- len_dat[
  !is.na(len_dat[["length_ms"]]) &
    !is.na(len_dat[[cat_col]]) &
    len_dat[["length_ms"]] > 0,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

len_dat[[cat_col]]  <- factor(len_dat[[cat_col]])
len_dat[[subj_col]] <- factor(len_dat[[subj_col]])

present_order_len <- desired_order[desired_order %in% levels(len_dat[[cat_col]])]
len_dat[[cat_col]] <- factor(len_dat[[cat_col]], levels = present_order_len)

len_dat <- as_tibble(len_dat)

# -----------------------------
# Subject-level descriptives
# -----------------------------
len_subj_means <- len_dat %>%
  group_by(.data[[subj_col]], .data[[cat_col]]) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_len = mean(.data[["length_ms"]]),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

len_group_summary <- len_subj_means %>%
  group_by(.data[[cat_col]]) %>%
  summarise(
    subjects          = n(),
    mean_of_subj_means = mean(mean_len),
    sd_of_subj_means   = sd(mean_len),
    .groups            = "drop"
  )

cat("\n===== Subject-level group summary: fixation duration (ms) =====\n")
print(len_group_summary)

# -----------------------------
# Mixed model
# -----------------------------
cat("\nFitting glmmTMB: length_ms ~", cat_col, "+ (1|", subj_col, ") with Gamma(log)\n")

len_model_gamma <- glmmTMB(
  formula = length_ms ~ ObjectCategoryMerged + (1 | SubjectID),
  family  = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data    = len_dat
)

cat("\n===== Mixed model summary: Gamma(log) fixation duration =====\n")
print(summary(len_model_gamma))

cat("\n===== Type II Wald chi-square test: Gamma(log) fixation duration =====\n")
print(Anova(len_model_gamma, type = "II"))

# -----------------------------
# Residual diagnostics
# -----------------------------
len_gamma_dharma_res <- run_dharma_checks(
  model = len_model_gamma,
  model_name = "Gamma(log) fixation duration"
)

pearson_res_gamma <- residuals(len_model_gamma, type = "pearson")
fitted_vals_gamma <- predict(len_model_gamma, type = "response")

op <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

plot(
  fitted_vals_gamma,
  pearson_res_gamma,
  xlab = "Fitted values",
  ylab = "Pearson residuals",
  main = "Residuals vs fitted\nGamma(log) fixation duration"
)
abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

boxplot(
  pearson_res_gamma,
  horizontal = TRUE,
  main = "Boxplot of Pearson residuals\nGamma(log) fixation duration",
  xlab = "Pearson residuals"
)

par(op)

palette_used_len <- palette_vals[present_order_len]

# -----------------------------
# Plot
# -----------------------------
p_len_subj <- ggplot(
  len_subj_means,
  aes(x = .data[[cat_col]], y = mean_len, fill = .data[[cat_col]])
) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.5, color = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_used_len) +
  labs(
    x     = "",
    y     = "Fixation duration (ms)",
    title = "Subject-level fixation duration by object category"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_len_subj)
```
